purpose: Delivery-control contract for building the D5 workagenda steering layer before creating the D5 statusmatrix, validation tickets, finance matrix, decision register, D5-D6 dependency map or dashboard view.
guardrails: This model is a control contract, not a local decision.
Do not treat source-backed working views as locally validated answers.
Do not mark finance as confirmed without finance/controller or insurer evidence.
Do not start workagenda drafting until status, validation, finance, decision and D5-D6 dependency layers exist.
D6 dependencies must stay visible as dependencies, not hidden inside D5 programme text.

delivery_status_values.label: Beantwoord uit bron
delivery_status_values.meaning: Public/corpus source directly answers the field.

delivery_status_values.label: Bron suggereert antwoord, validatie nodig
delivery_status_values.meaning: Source-backed working view exists, but local validation is required.

delivery_status_values.label: Lokale validatie nodig
delivery_status_values.meaning: Local practice, owner, coverage, capacity or evidence must be confirmed.

delivery_status_values.label: Bestuurlijk besluit nodig
delivery_status_values.meaning: A decision is needed before the field can be used as workagenda position.

delivery_status_values.label: Finance/controller nodig
delivery_status_values.meaning: Funding, structural continuation or double-counting must be checked.

delivery_status_values.label: Zorgverzekeraar/Zvw-bevestiging nodig
delivery_status_values.meaning: Zvw-side purchase, contract or insurer role must be confirmed.

delivery_status_values.label: ICT/privacy/data-bevestiging nodig
delivery_status_values.meaning: Data, privacy, dashboard, reporting or operational accountability must be confirmed.

delivery_status_values.label: Wachten op landelijke handreiking
delivery_status_values.meaning: National guidance or template is still expected.

delivery_status_values.label: Optioneel / niet van toepassing
delivery_status_values.meaning: Item is optional, excluded or not applicable for the current scope.

delivery_status_values.label: Onbekend
delivery_status_values.meaning: Not enough information to classify yet.

d5_scope.title: Ontwikkelagenda 1 nieuw: dementie, nicotinevrij, rookvrije start, multiproblematiek NPLV

milestones.meaning: Handreikingen basisfunctionaliteiten and process clarity for beproevende regio's expected.
Practical workagenda readiness for IZA governance and college route.
Formal deadline for regional workagenda adoption and VWS transmission.
Further clarity expected for later development-agenda items.
